titleStmt.title: SII 10.488: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 488. (A.R. No. 565 of 1909.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE WELL CALLED DĒVATULABHĀVI, VOPPICHEṞLA, PALNAD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1221. (Vikāri)

summary.p: States that, while Pratāpa-Rudradēva was king and Gajasāhiṇi Guṇḍaya-Nāyaka was governing the Gurindāla, Piṅgali and other provinces, the residents of Vrappicheṟla instituted a charity for supplying free water to men and cattle in the village and made a grant of land as endowment to the men employed in supplying the water.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastanijanāmāṁkamāḷikā
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara kākatiyyapratāparudradēvamahā
rājula divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaku laina
svasti śrīman mahārāyagajasāhiṇi sāmidrō
haragaṇḍa guṁḍayanāyaṁkulu guriṁdāla stalamu
piṁgali stalamu sahitamugānu Anēkadēśamulu su
khasaṁkadhāvinōdaṁbulaṁ brithivi rājyaṁbu sē
yucuṁḍaṁgānu svasti śrī śakhavaruṣaṁbulu
1221 yagu nēṁṭṭi vikārisaṁvatsara bhādrapa
da suddha 1 gu . vāramunanu vrappiceṟla
raḍaṁgunāyaṁkulu kāṁpulu samastaprajānu
sukhulai yuṁḍaṁgānu Āgrāmamukunu ka
lugāḍi dha¨rmmamunaku gōvulakunu Ūripra
nūti lamunu gāḍinūṁtanu gāḍi
ttivārijītamunaku krayadhārasa damu
yu veṭṭi kapperasūyabhaktuni koḍuku Aṁnnayabha
ktunicē vilici Iccina vritti cēnu Eṟṟaṁguṁṭalapā
ṭi teruvu paḍumara rēgaḍu muttumu na 3 cēnu
Ācaṁdrastāhigānu Istimi Īdha¨rmmamu pra
tiṣṭiṁcinavāru rājanamupāḍi pōtinēniṁgāru
kōmaṭi tatamaseṭṭiṁgārunu gōpereseṭṭini to
garumēdiniseṭṭini rudriseṭṭicevvayānu Idha¨rmma
mu Evvarēnānu ceḍakuṁḍānu naḍapina vāru gaṁga
kaṟta vēI gōvula dānamu sēsina phalamu vaḍayuduru
Īdha¨rmmamunaku Evvarēni vighnamu dalaṁcinavāru
tama peddakoḍuku kapālamunaṁ gā vāraṇāsi
praccina dōṣamunaṁ bōṁgalavāru svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara śaṣṭi ¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē nara . svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālayēt . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḥ
sphalaṁbhavēt . śatruṇāpi tru kṛtō dhaṁ¨rmma pālaniyyaṁ
prayatnataṁ . śatru rēva hi śatruṇāṁ dha¨rmma śatru
nakaściti . Icēniki paṁgatapu suṁkamu Aḍiginavaṟu
paṁccamahāpātakānaṁ baḍuduru
Digital edition of SII 10.488 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
